Diagnostic Equipment.name: Digital X-Ray System
Diagnostic Equipment.description: High-resolution digital X-ray imaging system with advanced diagnostic capabilities. Features instant image processing, minimal radiation exposure, and seamless integration with practice management software.

Diagnostic Equipment.name: Intraoral Camera
Diagnostic Equipment.description: Premium intraoral camera with HD imaging and LED illumination. Perfect for patient education and detailed diagnosis. Includes wireless connectivity and ergonomic design.

Diagnostic Equipment.name: Dental Microscope
Diagnostic Equipment.description: Professional-grade dental microscope with superior magnification and LED lighting. Ideal for endodontic procedures and detailed restorative work.

Treatment Equipment.name: Dental Unit Chair
Treatment Equipment.description: State-of-the-art dental chair with ergonomic design and multiple positioning options. Features integrated LED light, touch controls, and durable upholstery.

Treatment Equipment.name: Ultrasonic Scaler
Treatment Equipment.description: Professional ultrasonic scaler for efficient calculus removal. Features adjustable power settings, multiple tip options, and water flow control.

Treatment Equipment.name: Composite Curing Light
Treatment Equipment.description: High-intensity LED curing light with multiple curing modes. Provides fast and reliable polymerization with ergonomic wireless design.

Sterilization.name: Autoclave Sterilizer
Sterilization.description: Advanced autoclave sterilizer with rapid cycle times and large capacity. Features automatic door locking, digital display, and comprehensive safety systems.

Sterilization.name: Ultrasonic Cleaner
Sterilization.description: High-frequency ultrasonic cleaner for effective instrument cleaning. Features adjustable timer, temperature control, and stainless steel tank.

Hand Instruments.name: Surgical Instrument Set
Hand Instruments.description: Complete set of premium surgical instruments including forceps, elevators, and scalpels. Made from high-grade stainless steel for durability and precision.

Hand Instruments.name: Restorative Kit
Hand Instruments.description: Professional restorative instrument kit with excavators, carvers, and burnishers. Ergonomic handles for comfortable extended use.
